revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:羽林家]][[ko:우림가]][[zh:羽林家]]


Urinke is a Rank of Japanese noble houses above {{ill|Half-house (Kuge)|ja|半家_(公家)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Half-house (Kuge)|qq=}}
== Overview ==
'''Urinke''' (羽林家) is one of the Ranks among {{ill|Kuge|en|Kuge|qid=Q1196276|lt=Kuge|1=Kuge}} (court nobility) from the {{ill|Kamakura period|en|Kamakura period|qid=Q236205|lt=Kamakura period|1=Kamakura period}} onward. Positioned below the {{ill|Five regent houses|en|Five regent houses|qid=Q1067142|lt=Five regent houses|1=Five regent houses}}, {{ill|Seiga families|ja|清華家|1=Seiga families|2=ja|3=清華家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiga families|qq=}}, and {{ill|Daijinke|ja|大臣家|1=Daijinke|2=ja|3=大臣家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijinke|qq=}}, Urinke was equal to {{ill|Meike|ja|名家|1=Mei families|2=ja|3=名家 (公家)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meike|qq=}} and above {{ill|Hanke|ja|半家|1=Half-house (Kuge)|2=ja|3=半家 (公家)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanke|qq=}}. During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}, it was comparable to the Ranks assigned to daimyo families under the {{ill|Buke-kani|ja|武家官位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke-kani|1=Buke-kani|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545897}} system.
== Overview ==
Families of Urinke held military posts as {{ill|Konoe Shōshō and Chūjō|ja|近衛少将・中将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konoe Shōshō and Chūjō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, advancing from {{ill|Sangi (Japan)|en|Sangi (Japan)|qid=Q1133663|lt=Sangi|1=Sangi (Japan)}} up to {{ill|Chūnagon|en|Chūnagon|qid=Q1185382|lt=Chūnagon|1=Chūnagon}}, and at highest {{ill|Dainagon|en|Dainagon|qid=Q1354706|lt=Dainagon|1=Dainagon}}. Rarely, some rose to {{ill|Naidaijin|en|Naidaijin|qid=Q1185338|lt=Naidaijin|1=Naidaijin}}. Some also received titles like {{ill|Jundaijin|ja|准大臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jundaijin|1=jun-daijin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11395386}}, {{ill|Juichii|ja|従一位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Juichii|1=Junior First Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11071121}}, or {{ill|Honza Senge|ja|本座宣下|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honza Senge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. After the Meiji Restoration, these families were granted peerages such as viscount or count.
'''Urin''' (羽林) literally means "swift as feathers and numerous as trees," originating from Chinese stars guarding the North Star, later applied to palace guards protecting the emperor. In Japan, it became a term for the {{ill|Konoe-fu|ja|近衛府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konoe-fu|1=Konoefu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11638974}} (Imperial Guards), leading families holding Konoe positions to be called Urinke.
== Fujiwara Hokke Kan'in Line (23 families) ==
{{main|Kan'in Line|qq=}}
=== Sanjō Line ===
* {{ill|Shigenoi family|ja|滋野井家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shigenoi family|1=Shigenoi family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11564989}}: Branch of the {{ill|Sanjō family|ja|三条家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō family|qq=}}. Ancestor: {{ill|Shigenoi Sanekuni|ja|滋野井実国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shigenoi Sanekuni|1=Shigenoi Sanekuni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11564987}}, second son of {{ill|Sanjō Kinkata|ja|三条公教|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Kinkata|1=Sanjō Kiminori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11355816}}. Old family. Specialties: Kagura, Yūsoku kojitsu.
* {{ill|Ano family|ja|阿野家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ano family|1=Ano family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11657996}}: Branch of the Shigenoi family. Founded by {{ill|Fujiwara no Kinsuke|ja|藤原公佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Kinsuke|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 阿野公佐|1=Ano Kinsuke|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q106515847}}, son of {{ill|Fujiwara no Narichika|en|Fujiwara no Narichika|qid=Q5507533|lt=Fujiwara no Narichika|1=Fujiwara no Narichika}}, adopted by Shigenoi Sanekuni. Old family. Specialty: Kagura.
* {{ill|Kawahire family|ja|河鰭家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawahire family|1=Kawabata family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22127234}}: Branch of the Shigenoi family. Ancestor: {{ill|Fujiwara no Kinkiyo|ja|藤原公清|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Kinkiyo|1=Fujiwara no Kinkiyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17213726}}, second son of Shigenoi Sanekuni. Old family. Specialty: Kagura.
* {{ill|Yamamoto family|ja|山本家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamamoto family|1=Yamamoto family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24869485}}: Branch of the Ano family. Ancestor: {{ill|Yamamoto Katsutada|ja|山本勝忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamamoto Katsutada|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, youngest son of Ano Sanenobu. New family.
* {{ill|Anenokōji clan|en|Anenokōji clan|qid=Q2975216|lt=Anekōji family|1=Anenokōji clan}}: Branch of the Sanjō family. Ancestor: {{ill|Anekōji Kinnobu|ja|姉小路公宣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anekōji Kinnobu|1=Anekōji Kinnobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17191611}}, son of {{ill|Sanjō Sanefusa|ja|三条実房|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Sanefusa|1=Sanjō Sanefusa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11355831}}. Temporarily discontinued; restored by Ano Sanenobu’s third son, Anekōji Kinkage, in the early Edo period. New family.
* {{ill|Kazahaya family|en|Kazahaya family|qid=Q22122989|lt=Kazahaya family|1=Kazahaya family}}: Branch of the Anekōji family. Ancestor: Sanetane, second son of Anekōji Kinkage. New family. Specialty: Tea ceremony.
* {{ill|Mushakōji family|ja|武者小路家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mushakōji family|1=Mushanokōji family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11546295}}: Branch of the Sanjōnishi family. Ancestor: {{ill|Mushakōji Kintane|ja|武者小路公種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mushakōji Kintane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, son of Sanjōnishi Sanekane. New family. Specialty: Poetry.
* {{ill|Takamatsu family|ja|高松家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu family|1=Takamatsu family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22126263}}: Branch of the Mushakōji family. Ancestor: Shigetsugu, son of Mushakōji Sanekage.
* {{ill|Oshikōji family (Kan'in line)|ja|押小路家 (閑院流)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oshikōji family (Kan'in line)|1=Oshikōji family (Kan'in line)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q85880497}}: Branch of the Sanjōnishi family. Ancestor: Oshikōji Kintoki, son of Sanjōnishi Kinkatsu. New family.
* {{ill|Hanazono family|ja|花園家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanazono family|1=Hanazono family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22124937}}: Branch of the Ōgimachi Sanjō family. Ancestor: Hanazono Sanahisa (claimed grandson of Ōgimachi Sanjō Kimiaki; dubious chronology). New family. Specialty: Biwa.
=== Saionji Line ===
* {{ill|Shimizudani family|ja|清水谷家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimizudani family|1=Shimizudani family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11561185}}: Branch of the Saionji family. Ancestor: Shimizudani Saneari, son of Saionji Kintsune. Old family. Specialties: Calligraphy, Shō, Noh, Kagura.
* {{ill|Yotsutsuji family|ja|四辻家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yotsutsuji family|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町家|1=Muromachi family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11453057}}: Branch of the Saionji family. Ancestor: Yotsutsuji Sanefuji, fourth son of Saionji Kintsune. Renamed Muromachi family after Meiji Restoration. Old family. Specialties: Kagura, Wagon, Koto.
* {{ill|Nishiyotsutsuji family|ja|西四辻家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishiyotsutsuji family|1=Nishiyotsutsuji family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22129682}}: Branch of the Yotsutsuji family. Ancestor: Nishiyotsutsuji Kinhito, son of Yotsutsuji Kinyuki. New family. Specialty: Koto.
* {{ill|Hashimoto family|ja|橋本家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hashimoto family|1=Hashimoto family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11543913}}: Branch of the Saionji family. Originates from Saionji Sanetoshi, son of Saionji Kintsugu.
* {{ill|Umezono family|ja|梅園家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umezono family|1=Umezono family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11538425}}: Branch of the Hashimoto family. Ancestor: Sanekiyo, second son of Hashimoto Sanekatsu. Old family.
* {{ill|Ōmiya family (Kan'in line)|ja|大宮家 (閑院流)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmiya family (Kan'in line)|1=Ōmiya family (Kan'in line)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q132154849}}: Branch of the Saionji family. Ancestor: Suemitsu, second son of Saionji Kinyoshi. New family.
* {{ill|Ogura family|ja|小倉家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ogura family|1=Ogura family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11458941}}: Branch of the Tōin family. Ancestor: Ogura Kimio, son of Tōin Sanekatsu. Old family. Specialty: Kagura.
* {{ill|Ōgimachi family|ja|正親町家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōgimachi family|1=Ōgimachi family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545689}}: Branch of the Tōin family. Ancestor: Ōgimachi Saneaki, son of Tōin Kimmori. Old family. Specialties: Koto, Calligraphy.
* {{ill|Urazuji family|ja|裏辻家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urazuji family|1=Uratsuji family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11626785}}: Branch of the Ōgimachi family. Ancestor: Urazuji Sukeyoshi, son of Ōgimachi Suesaka. Formerly known as Urazukiji. New family.
=== Fujiwara Nanke Takakura (Yabu) Line & Fujiwara Hokke Shijō Line ===
* {{ill|Yabu family|ja|藪家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yabu family|1=Yabu family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24869576}}
* {{ill|Nakazono family|ja|中園家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakazono family|1=Nakazono family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22124123}}
* {{ill|Takaoka family|ja|高丘家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaoka family|1=Takaoka family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22124887}}
* {{ill|Sonoike family|ja|園池家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonoike family|1=Sonoike family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24899967}}
== Fujiwara Hokke Kazan'in Line (5 families) ==
{{main|Kazan'in Line|qq=}}
* {{ill|Nakayama family|ja|中山家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama family|1=Nakayama family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11364137}}
* {{ill|Imajo family|ja|今城家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajo family|1=Imaki family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22122861}}
* {{ill|Naniwa family|ja|難波家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naniwa family|1=Namba family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11659537}}
* {{ill|Asukai family|en|Asukai family|qid=Q11665942|lt=Asukai family|1=Asukai family}}
* {{ill|Nonomiya family|ja|野宮家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nonomiya family|1=Nonomiya family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11645309}}
== Fujiwara Hokke Nakamikado Line (9 families) ==
{{main|Nakamikado Line|qq=}}
* {{ill|Matsunoki family|ja|松木家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsunoki family|qq=}}
* {{ill|Jimyōin family|ja|持明院家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jimyōin family|1=Jimyōin family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11497903}}
* {{ill|Sono family|ja|園家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sono family|1=Sono family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11422788}}
* {{ill|Higashisono family|ja|東園家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashisono family|1=Higashisono family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11526391}}
* {{ill|Mibu family|ja|壬生家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mibu family|1=Mibu family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11429501}}
* {{ill|Ishiyama family|ja|石山家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishiyama family|1=Ishiyama family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11585527}}
* {{ill|Rokkaku family|ja|六角家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokkaku family|1=Rokkaku family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11392523}}
* {{ill|Takano family|ja|高野家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takano family|1=Takano family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11673046}}
* {{ill|Ishino family|ja|石野家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishino family|1=Iwano family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22127306}}
== Fujiwara Hokke Mikohidari Line (4 families) ==
{{main|Mikohidari family|qq=}}
* {{ill|Reizei family (upper)|ja|冷泉家（上冷泉）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reizei family (upper)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Reizei family (lower)|ja|冷泉家（下冷泉）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reizei family (lower)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Fujiya family|ja|藤谷家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiya family|1=Fujitani family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22125561}}
* {{ill|Irie family|ja|入江家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Irie family|1=Irie family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22122978}}
== Fujiwara Hokke Shijō Line (7 families) ==
{{main|Shijō Line|qq=}}
* {{ill|Shijō family|ja|四条家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shijō family|1=Shijō family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11420009}}
* {{ill|Yamashina family|ja|山科家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashina family|qq=}}
* {{ill|Nishioji family|ja|西大路家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishioji family|1=Nishioji family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11627578}}
* {{ill|Aburanokōji family|ja|油小路家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aburanokōji family|1=Aburanokōji family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22125222}}
* {{ill|Washio family|ja|鷲尾家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washio family|1=Washio family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24868342}}
* {{ill|Kushige family|ja|櫛笥家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushige family|1=Kushige family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22126343}}
* {{ill|Hachijō family|ja|八条家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachijō family|1=Hachijō family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22122983}}
== Fujiwara Hokke Minase Line (5 families) ==
{{main|Minase Line|qq=}}
* {{ill|Minase family|ja|水無瀬家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minase family|1=Minase family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11548957}}
* {{ill|Shichijō family|ja|七条家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichijō family|1=Shichijō family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22129344}}
* {{ill|Machijiri family|ja|町尻家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machijiri family|1=Machijiri family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22131601}}
* {{ill|Sakurai family|ja|桜井家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai family|1=Sakurai family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11537800}}
* {{ill|Yamai family|ja|山井家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamai family|1=Yamanoi family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24868887}}
== Fujiwara Hokke Takakura Line (2 families) ==
{{main|Takakura Line|qq=}}
* {{ill|Horikawa family|ja|堀河家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikawa family|1=Horikawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11427578}}
* {{ill|Higuchi family|ja|樋口家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higuchi family|1=Higuchi family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22124331}}
== Uda Genji (3 families) ==
{{main|Uda Genji|qq=}}
* {{ill|Niwata family|ja|庭田家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niwata family|1=Niwata family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11486209}}: Descendants of Prince Atsumi; ancestor is {{ill|Minamoto no Tsunemoto|ja|源経資|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Tsunemoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Old family. Specialties: Kagura, Calligraphy, Flower arranging.
* {{ill|Ayakoji family|ja|綾小路家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ayakoji family|1=Ayanokōji clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11607285}}: Branch of the Niwata family; ancestor is Ayakoji Nobuari, son of Niwata Arisuke. Old family. Specialties: Biwa, Fue (flute), Hichiriki, Koto, Kagura, Kemari.
* {{ill|Ohara family|ja|大原家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ohara family|1=Ohara family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11433142}}: Branch of the Niwata family; ancestor is Ohara Hideaki, adopted son of Niwata Shigetada (actually son of either Kuzuoka Nobuyuki or Kuzuoka Nakakata). New family. Specialty: Kagura.
== Murakami Genji (8 families) ==
{{main|Murakami Genji|qq=}}
* {{ill|Rokujō family|ja|六条家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokujō family|1=Rokujō family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11392411}}: Branch of the Koga family; ancestor is Rokujō Michiari, fifth son of Koga Michimitsu. Old family.
* {{ill|Iwakura family|ja|岩倉家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakura family|1=Iwakura family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11474158}}: Branch of the Koga family; ancestor is Iwakura Tomotaka, son of Koga Harumichi. New family.
* {{ill|Chigusa family|ja|千種家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chigusa family|1=Chigusa family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405808}}: Originally a branch of Rokujō, later a branch of Iwakura; ancestor is Chigusa Tadaaki, son of Rokujō Michitada. Discontinued in the early Muromachi period, revived by Chigusa Aritaka, fourth son of Iwakura Tomotaka, in the early Edo period. New family. Specialty: Waka poetry.
* {{ill|Higashikuze family|ja|東久世家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashikuze family|1=Higashikuze family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11523897}}: Branch of the Koga family; ancestor is Higashikuze Michikado, third son of Koga Michikata. New family.
* {{ill|Kuze family|ja|久世家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuze family|1=Kuze family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11368902}}: Branch of the Koga family; ancestor is Kuze Michinori, youngest son of Koga Atsumichi. New family. Specialty: Waka poetry.
* {{ill|Umetani family|ja|梅溪家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umetani family|1=Umetani family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22122863}}: Branch of the Koga family; ancestor is Umetani Sukemichi, second son of Koga Michiyo. New family.
* {{ill|Atago family|ja|愛宕家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago family|1=Otagi family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22122862}}: Branch of the Nakanoin family; ancestor is Atago Michifuku, adopted son of Nakanoin Michizumi (actually third son of Sakurai Tomotaka). New family.
* {{ill|Uematsu family|ja|植松家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uematsu family|1=Uematsu family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11540623}}: Branch of the Chigusa family; ancestor is Uematsu Masanaga, youngest son of Chigusa Aritaka. New family. Specialty: Flower arranging.

== See Also ==
* {{ill|Dōjōke|ja|堂上家|1=Tōshōke|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōjōke|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11427847}}
